summary.en: North Korea operates a 220 V / 50 Hz electrical grid with Type C and Type F plug configurations, consistent with the continental European standard. OSIM administers product safety standards for electrical equipment. Wireless devices with mains power supplies must be designed and tested for 220 V / 50 Hz operation. IEC 62368-1 (audio/video and IT equipment safety) serves as the international reference standard; DPRK national KS standards align with IEC but must be confirmed via OSIM. Power supply reliability in the DPRK is poor in many areas; equipment must tolerate voltage fluctuation. Note: access to OSIM electrical safety certification is practically unavailable to foreign exporters under current sanctions.
summary.zh: 朝鲜电网采用220V/50Hz标准，插头规格为C型和F型，与欧洲大陆标准一致。OSIM负责管理电气设备产品安全标准。带市电电源的无线设备须针对220V/50Hz运行进行设计和测试。IEC 62368-1（音视频及信息技术设备安全）是国际参考标准；DPRK国家KS标准与IEC接轨，但须通过OSIM确认。DPRK许多地区的供电可靠性较差，设备须能承受电压波动。注意：在当前制裁环境下，境外出口商实际上无法获得OSIM电气安全认证。
summary.zht: 北韓電網採用220V/50Hz標準，插頭規格為C型和F型，與歐洲大陸標準一致。OSIM負責管理電氣設備產品安全標準。帶市電電源的無線設備須針對220V/50Hz運行進行設計和測試。IEC 62368-1（音視頻及信息技術設備安全）是國際參考標準；DPRK國家KS標準與IEC接軌，但須通過OSIM確認。DPRK許多地區的供電可靠性較差，設備須能承受電壓波動。注意：在當前制裁環境下，境外出口商實際上無法獲得OSIM電氣安全認證。

standards_or_laws: OSIM (국가품질감독위원회) — DPRK electrical product safety standards (KS)
IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment safety (international reference)
220 V / 50 Hz grid — Type C/F plug standard

summary.en: China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A/I plugs (different from DPRK Type C/F). CCC certification covers electrical safety under GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) for IT and communications equipment. Plug type difference means Chinese product plug configurations require adaptation for DPRK use.
summary.zh: 中国采用220V/50Hz电网，插头为A/I型（与DPRK的C/F型不同）。CCC认证涵盖IT及通信设备按GB 4943.1（与IEC 62368-1接轨）的电气安全要求。插头类型差异意味着中国产品的插头配置须为DPRK使用进行适配。
summary.zht: 中國採用220V/50Hz電網，插頭為A/I型（與DPRK的C/F型不同）。CCC認證涵蓋IT及通信設備按GB 4943.1（與IEC 62368-1接軌）的電氣安全要求。插頭類型差異意味著中國產品的插頭配置須為DPRK使用進行適配。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) — IT and communications equipment electrical safety
CCC compulsory certification — includes electrical safety evaluation
220 V / 50 Hz — China grid voltage (same voltage, different plug: Type A/I)

gap.en: Voltage (220 V / 50 Hz) is identical between China and DPRK, but plug type differs (China Type A/I vs. DPRK Type C/F). Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by OSIM. DPRK KS standards apply. Power reliability issues in the DPRK may require additional ruggedisation for voltage tolerance. OSIM certification access is practically unavailable under sanctions.
gap.zh: 中国与DPRK的电压（220V/50Hz）相同，但插头类型不同（中国A/I型 vs. DPRK C/F型）。中国CCC电气安全认证不被OSIM认可。须适用DPRK KS标准。DPRK供电可靠性问题可能要求额外的电压耐受加固措施。制裁环境下实际上无法获得OSIM认证。
gap.zht: 中國與DPRK的電壓（220V/50Hz）相同，但插頭類型不同（中國A/I型 vs. DPRK C/F型）。中國CCC電氣安全認證不被OSIM認可。須適用DPRK KS標準。DPRK供電可靠性問題可能要求額外的電壓耐受加固措施。制裁環境下實際上無法獲得OSIM認證。

mandatory_status.target: Required for mains-powered devices (sanctions authorisation required first)

source.publisher: IEC — World Plugs: Type C, Type F

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] North Korea uses 220 V / 50 Hz (Type C/F plugs). Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by OSIM. Plug adaptation from Chinese Type A/I to Type C/F is required. OSIM KS-based certification must be obtained for any permitted device, but access to OSIM procedures is practically unavailable under current sanctions. This row is provided for compliance awareness only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 朝鲜采用220V/50Hz（C/F型插头）。中国CCC电气安全认证不被OSIM认可。需将插头从中国A/I型适配为C/F型。任何获准设备须取得基于OSIM KS标准的认证，但在当前制裁环境下实际上无法获得OSIM程序的支持。本条目仅供合规意识参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 北韓採用220V/50Hz（C/F型插頭）。中國CCC電氣安全認證不被OSIM認可。需將插頭從中國A/I型適配為C/F型。任何獲准設備須取得基於OSIM KS標準的認證，但在當前制裁環境下實際上無法獲得OSIM程序的支持。本條目僅供合規意識參考。
